TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_kobah, title = kobah, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/kobah} }

S.FORM: alang kobah ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 141 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 37 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 67%, Setik 4%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na kobah hya' gargyax krahu'. tay 'zil na kobah hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na kobah hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na kobah hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na kobah hya' ga Malepa. tay 'zil na kobah hya' ga Masitoban. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang kobah ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 56 buwan, 141 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 74% kyan ku 104 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 26% kyan ku 37 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 67%, Setik 4%, Bunun 1%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na kobah hya' gargyax krahu'. tay 'zil na kobah hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na kobah hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na kobah hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na kobah hya' ga Malepa. tay 'zil na kobah hya' ga Masitoban. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ koβaħ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕetik *%, βunun *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na koβaħ ħjaʔ ɣarɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na koβaħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na koβaħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na koβaħ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na koβaħ ħjaʔ ɣa malepa. taj ʔzil na koβaħ ħjaʔ ɣa mas~ɕitoβan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
